# `xterm-session` sequences

<!-- Generated by `qdb generate reference` from `db/xterm-session.toml`. Do not edit by hand. -->

## Enter Legacy Alternate Screen (`xterm.alternate_screen.enter_47`)

Legacy xterm alternate-screen form; does not save cursor like 1049.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI ? 47 h`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/xterm/enter_alternate_screen_47.seq`](../../../fixtures/xterm/enter_alternate_screen_47.seq)

## Leave Legacy Alternate Screen (`xterm.alternate_screen.leave_47`)

Cleanup pair for the legacy mode 47 alternate screen.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI ? 47 l`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/xterm/leave_alternate_screen_47.seq`](../../../fixtures/xterm/leave_alternate_screen_47.seq)

## Enter Alternate Screen Buffer (`xterm.alternate_screen.enter_1047`)

Compatibility alternate-screen buffer switch without cursor save/restore.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI ? 1047 h`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/xterm/enter_alternate_screen_1047.seq`](../../../fixtures/xterm/enter_alternate_screen_1047.seq)

## Leave Alternate Screen Buffer (`xterm.alternate_screen.leave_1047`)

Cleanup pair for mode 1047 alternate-screen buffer.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI ? 1047 l`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/xterm/leave_alternate_screen_1047.seq`](../../../fixtures/xterm/leave_alternate_screen_1047.seq)

## Enter Alternate Screen (`xterm.alternate_screen.enter_1049`)

Common full-screen TUI lifecycle command.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI ? 1049 h`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/xterm/enter_alternate_screen_1049.seq`](../../../fixtures/xterm/enter_alternate_screen_1049.seq)
- Notes: Session lifecycle code pairs this with an explicit csi.ed.clear_screen (CSI 2 J) immediately after entry: some hosts (mosh) do not clear the alternate buffer on 1049, and helix emits its own clear for exactly this reason (R-OUT-3).

## Leave Alternate Screen (`xterm.alternate_screen.leave_1049`)

Cleanup pair for entering the alternate screen.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI ? 1049 l`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/xterm/leave_alternate_screen_1049.seq`](../../../fixtures/xterm/leave_alternate_screen_1049.seq)

## DECSCUSR Default Cursor Style (`xterm.cursor.style.default`)

Resets the cursor style to the terminal profile default.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 0 SP q`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/xterm/cursor_style_default.seq`](../../../fixtures/xterm/cursor_style_default.seq)
- Notes: No single Ps value is a universal restore-to-prior-shape (FM-L3): this asks for the terminal profile's own default, not necessarily whatever shape was active before.

## DECSCUSR Blinking Block Cursor (`xterm.cursor.style.blinking_block`)

Sets a blinking block cursor shape.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 1 SP q`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/xterm/cursor_style_blinking_block.seq`](../../../fixtures/xterm/cursor_style_blinking_block.seq)

## DECSCUSR Steady Block Cursor (`xterm.cursor.style.steady_block`)

Sets a steady (non-blinking) block cursor shape.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 2 SP q`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/xterm/cursor_style_steady_block.seq`](../../../fixtures/xterm/cursor_style_steady_block.seq)

## DECSCUSR Blinking Underline Cursor (`xterm.cursor.style.blinking_underline`)

Sets a blinking underline cursor shape.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 3 SP q`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/xterm/cursor_style_blinking_underline.seq`](../../../fixtures/xterm/cursor_style_blinking_underline.seq)

## DECSCUSR Steady Underline Cursor (`xterm.cursor.style.steady_underline`)

Sets a steady (non-blinking) underline cursor shape.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 4 SP q`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/xterm/cursor_style_steady_underline.seq`](../../../fixtures/xterm/cursor_style_steady_underline.seq)

## DECSCUSR Blinking Bar Cursor (`xterm.cursor.style.blinking_bar`)

Sets a blinking bar (I-beam) cursor shape.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 5 SP q`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/xterm/cursor_style_blinking_bar.seq`](../../../fixtures/xterm/cursor_style_blinking_bar.seq)

## DECSCUSR Steady Bar Cursor (`xterm.cursor.style.steady_bar`)

Common editor cursor shape; blink policy remains terminal-profile dependent.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 6 SP q`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/xterm/cursor_style_steady_bar.seq`](../../../fixtures/xterm/cursor_style_steady_bar.seq)

## Hide Cursor (`xterm.cursor.hide`)

Hides the text cursor.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI ? 25 l`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/xterm/hide_cursor.seq`](../../../fixtures/xterm/hide_cursor.seq)

## Show Cursor (`xterm.cursor.show`)

Cleanup pair for hiding the cursor.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI ? 25 h`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)

## Begin Synchronized Output (`xterm.sync_output.enable`)

Capability-gated because some terminals mishandle queries.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI ? 2026 h`
- References: [Contour: Synchronized Output VT extension](https://contour-terminal.org/vt-extensions/synchronized-output/) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/xterm/sync_output_enable.seq`](../../../fixtures/xterm/sync_output_enable.seq)

## End Synchronized Output (`xterm.sync_output.disable`)

Cleanup pair for synchronized output.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI ? 2026 l`
- References: [Contour: Synchronized Output VT extension](https://contour-terminal.org/vt-extensions/synchronized-output/) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/xterm/sync_output_disable.seq`](../../../fixtures/xterm/sync_output_disable.seq)
